remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target permanent you control named Volo's Journal
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Draw a card for each creature type noted for target permanent you control named Volo's Journal.

params.TriggerDescription: When NICKNAME enters, create Volo's Journal, a legendary colorless artifact token with hexproof and "Whenever you cast a creature spell, note one of its creature types that hasn't been noted for this artifact."
